## Tests Added/Updated
<!-- REQUIRED. Describe the regression test(s) that exercise this change. If this PR genuinely cannot have a test, state that explicitly here. -->

## Architecture Notes
<!-- Mention any changes to bridge/content/background boundaries, host permissions, managed policy, or shared message contracts. -->

## Checklist
- [ ] Conventional commit prefix (`feat:`, `fix:`, `chore:`, `test:`, `docs:`, `refactor:`)
- [ ] Tests added or updated for behavior changes
- [ ] No real production hostnames, secrets, or customer-specific URLs in source
- [ ] No new host permissions without justification above
- [ ] No new top-level dependencies without justification above
- [ ] `pnpm check` passes locally
- [ ] `AGENTS.md` updated if conventions or architecture boundaries changed
